author: lOrm
content: Fixed: McpServer::call_tool now inspects the MCP-spec isError flag on the tools/call result. When isError==true, extracts content[0].text and surfaces it as the new McpError::ToolReportedError { message } variant instead of returning a tool failure as Value. Three new tests cover isError:true→typed error, isError:false/absent→Ok passthrough, isError:true without content→fallback message naming the tool. McpManager::call_tool reconnect path only triggers on McpError::Transport so the new variant correctly does NOT mark the server disconnected. All 1666 lib tests pass (single pre-existing worktree-test failure unrelated), cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -D warnings exits 0, no #[allow]/#[ignore]/clippy.toml.
